titleStmt.title: SII 38.356: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 356. (A.R. No. 356 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutayyadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1455, Vikṛiti, siṁha, śu. 10. Friday, uttiram. August 29, 1533 A.D. but the cyclic year was Vijaya not Vikṛiti.

summary.p: This inscription records that Īśānaśiva-chāriyār of Bhīkshā-maṭha, who was also bound for service in the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram, a territory (paṟṟu) situated next to Rājagambīran-malai in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, temple official, and kaikkōḷa-mudaligaḷ conferred the cultivating right (kāṇiyāṭchi) on Kāḷattīsura-Nāyakkar, son of Tirumalai-Nāyakkar, the Kaṉṉaḍiya-nāyakamārs residing at Marudarasar-paḍaivīḍu. Accordingly, he was given the privilege of managing the above temple affairs as secretary, supervisor and chief executive officer. It is also stated that for these duties, he was given all wet and dry lands in the village and another 1000 kuḻi of wet land at the village, Kailāyam. Besides these he was also entitled to receive daily one kuṟuṇi of rice, five dishes, one palam of sandal and also betel leaves and arecanut as prasādam from temple. He was also to receive ten paṇam of money and ten kalam of paddy for employing an accountant under him.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍar, the pontiff, Īśānaśiva-chāriyār, and the tāṉattār, Karaiēṟaviṭṭār Chandranambi and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuvastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metiṉimicura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva Ariyarāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭanāṭukuṭātāṉ tulukka taḷavipāṭaṉ keca taḷavipāṭaṉ Inturāya curatāṇan yiḻam tiṟaikoṇṭa yirācātirācaṉ Irāca(para)mecuraṉ pūṟuvatekṣaṇa paccimauttira catta camuttirātipati Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟai
koṇṭaruḷi kātiirācaṉRead irācātiirācaṉkecaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvirappiṟatāpa naracarnāyakkauṭaiyar kumārar Accutaiyyateva makāirāyar piṟutivi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 5 mel cellā niṉṟa vikuṟuti varuṣattu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu cukkiṟa vāramum tecamiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu
melkuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu Irācakempiraṉ malaikkaṭuttapaṟṟu ceyyāṟṟukku teṉ pirivāṉa tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram nayiṉār tirumalarvuṭaiyanayiṉār tirukkoyilkāriyattukku kaṭavarāṉa pikṣāmaṭam yicāṉacivācāriyarum tāṉamāyecurar kaikkoḷa mutalikaḷum marutaracar paṭaivīṭṭil Irukkum kaṉṉaṭiyanāyakkamāril tirumalaināyakkar Ayyaṉ kumārar
kāḷatticuranāyakkar Ayyaṉukku kāṇiyāṭci paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi tevakkāpura tirumalar Uṭaiyanayiṉār tirukkoyilkeḻvi pārapattiya muṉ Oṭukka mun cuvantiram muttirai tirvukku Eḻuttu Iṉta cuvantirattukku māṉiyam murukamaṅkalattil naṟuvili tāṅkal nañcai puñcai Uṇṭāṉatum kayilāyammalaiāḻvāṉ puṟavaṭaiyil nañcaikuḻi Āyiramum koyilil
peṟukiṟa nāḷ Oṉṟukku piṟacātattukku Aricikuṟuṇiyum tiruppaṇiyāram vakai Añcukku paṇiyāram Añcum cantaṉam palam Oṉṟum pākkunālum veṟṟilai Eṭṭum koyilkeḻvi mutal Eḻutik kaṇakkuppiḷḷaikku mātam Oṉṟukku paṇam pattum nellu patiṅkalamum Āka Inta vakaippaṭi cuvantiram Uṇṭāṉatellām kāṇiyāṭci Āka paṇṇi kuṭuttom Inta kāṇiyāṭcci cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum
Inta kāṇi Āṭcikku yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavar Ākavum yippaṭikku yintak kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu yivai kurukkaḷ yicāṉacivācāriyar Eḻuttu yivai tāṉattār karaieṟaviṭṭār cantiranampi Eḻuttu yivai māyecurar tirumalaiccivaṉ kaṅkāṇi
Āṇṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa māyecurar Eḻuttu kaikkoḷa mutali kāliṅkarāyar kollāviṭṭār vāṇavarāyar Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
